description: Loadgen-native caller-identity preservation through the in-process B2BUA SUT. Binds the anchors the loadgen mux tags (agent `bob`, not the e2e `bob1`): the b-leg INVITE bob receives carries a From tag and Max-Forwards, and the answer alice receives is properly tagged. To-user correlation rewrites the To user-part with the per-call token, so this set deliberately asserts NOTHING about the To URI — only the From tag, Max-Forwards, and the answer To-tag, all of which survive any SIP-correct B2BUA.
